entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
[form answers — discovery]
- What are we making?: Multi-screen app prototype
- Target platform: iOS app, Desktop web, Responsive web
- Who is this for?: (skipped)
- Visual tone: Championship Manager faithful, Modern-retro hybrid
- Brand context: Pick a direction for me [value: pick_direction]
- Which screens do you need?: Title Screen — Game logo "SQUAD", tagline "FOOTBALL CARD ROGUELIKE", START CAMPAIGN button, match info (5 matches, 3 rounds, 6 phases)

Squad Builder — Player list grouped by position (GK, CB, FB, CDM, CM, CAM, LW, RW, ST), each with ATK/PAC/PAS/DEF/SPC stats and cost. Budget bar (360 max). Your selected squad shown below. Confirm button.

Formation Select — Choose from formations like 4-4-2, 4-3-3, 3-5-2, 4-2-3-1, 5-3-2, 4-1-2-1-2. Each has position slots that determine which positions you can field.

Match Screen — Shows opponent name, current score, round progress, and the phase/round structure. Contains the pitch area where you place players for each phase.

Phase Placement — Current phase name (Goal Kick, Tiki-Taka, Counter-Attack, etc.), weight icon, description. Shows slots to fill and your current player placements on the pitch. Choose which players to assign to each slot. Shows fatigue levels and synergy previews.

Phase Result — Shows which synergies fired, per-player chip contributions, the total phase score. Continue button.

Round Result — Shows won/lost, round score vs target, match score. States: WIN ROUND, LOSE ROUND, MATCH WON (if 2 rounds won), MATCH LOST.

Campaign Complete — Shows results of all 5 matches (WIN/LOSE), play again button.

Player Picker — Overlay/list showing available players for a position slot, with their stats and chips calculation. Confirm to place them on the pitch.
- Anything else I should know?: (skipped)
